flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Rio Hondo College fell 60% between 2007 and 2010 (64.8% → 26.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Rio Hondo College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rio Hondo College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($525 → $666).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rio Hondo College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).
